findingDetails.title: Packet-history docs still contain current stale goal.md operational claims
findingDetails.claim: A small number of packet-history docs still present .opencode/commands/goal.md as a current operational target or assert stale-reference cleanliness that is no longer literally true.
counterEvidence: .opencode/specs/deep-loops/032-goal-opencode-plugin/011-command-surface-normalization/implementation-summary.md:117 explicitly classifies remaining goal.md hits as historical narrative
.opencode/skills/system-spec-kit/constitutional/goal-prompting-runtime-specific.md:25-50 names goal_opencode.md as current and keeps past names as rename history
findingDetails.scopeProof: Glob .opencode/commands/*goal*.md returned only .opencode/commands/goal_opencode.md; narrowed rg excluding review/research/changelog/archive folders found active hits only in phase 009 handover and phase 011 docs plus explicit historical rename narrative.
findingDetails.recommendation: Annotate or leave per operator preference; if edited later, update only current operational lines and preserve historical narrative.

traceabilityChecks.phase011_tasks: current-and-wrong at tasks.md:66 and tasks.md:109; tasks.md:53 is mixed historical completed-task wording
traceabilityChecks.reviewArchiveReadme: README.md:12 current-and-wrong scope table; README.md:17 historical originally-included statement
traceabilityChecks.independentSweep: additional active-scope hits classified as historical rename narrative or already-covered review state; no extra finding beyond DR-006-P2-001

evidence: Task text still names goal.md as the rename target/final canonical name, and completion criteria claims zero stale-reference hits despite current sweep returning hits.
Dated changelog records what Phase 003 claimed/changed at the time; not current operational guidance.
Line 12 is a present-tense scope table pointing at absent goal.md; line 17 is historical because it says originally included.

command: rg -n goal\.md .opencode -g *.md excluding node_modules/dist plus narrowed active-doc exclusions
result: Additional hits were historical rename narrative, archived research/review state, or already-covered review artifacts; no extra active plugin/command-context finding beyond DR-006-P2-001.
